name: Holding
description: Parent organization that owns stakes in subsidiaries
description_fr: Société mère qui détient des participations dans des filiales
characteristics: Controls other entities through equity participation

name: Operating Organization
description: Organization that directly conducts business operations
description_fr: Société qui exerce directement une activité commerciale
characteristics: Generates revenue through products or services

name: Joint Venture
description: Entity jointly owned by two or more parties for a shared purpose
description_fr: Entité détenue conjointement par deux parties ou plus
characteristics: Common in international or cross-sector projects

name: Special Purpose Vehicle
description: Entity created for a specific limited purpose or transaction
description_fr: Entité créée pour un objet spécifique ou une opération définie
characteristics: Often used in finance structured deals or real estate

name: Public Organization
description: Organization whose shares are traded on a public stock exchange
description_fr: Société dont les titres sont admis aux négociations sur un marché réglementé
characteristics: Subject to listing rules and public disclosure obligations

name: Private Organization
description: Organization whose shares are not publicly traded
description_fr: Société dont le capital n'est pas ouvert au public
characteristics: Ownership is limited to founders investors or employees

name: Investment Vehicle
description: Entity structured to hold or manage financial investments
description_fr: Structure dédiée à la détention ou la gestion d'actifs financiers
characteristics: Includes funds SPACs and family holding vehicles

name: Shell Organization
description: Organization with no active business operations or assets
description_fr: Société sans activité ni actif réel
characteristics: Used for restructuring holding purposes or acquisitions

name: Association
description: Non-profit membership organization governed by its members
description_fr: Organisation à but non lucratif régie par ses membres

name: Foundation
description: Non-profit entity created to serve a public or private charitable purpose
description_fr: Entité à but non lucratif créée pour une cause d'intérêt général
characteristics: Funded by an endowment or ongoing donations

name: Non Profit
description: Organization that does not distribute profits to owners or shareholders
description_fr: Organisation qui ne distribue pas ses excédents à ses membres

name: Government Entity
characteristics: Includes ministries agencies and state-owned entities

name: Public Agency
description: Agency operating under public authority mandates
description_fr: Agence opérant sous mandat d'autorité publique
characteristics: Can be semi-autonomous or fully state-controlled

name: Cooperative
description: Organization owned and democratically controlled by its members
description_fr: Organisation détenue et gérée démocratiquement par ses membres
characteristics: Common in agriculture banking and retail

name: Partnership
description: Business entity formed by two or more persons sharing ownership
description_fr: Entité formée par deux personnes ou plus partageant la propriété
characteristics: Can be general or limited partnership

name: Trust
description: Legal arrangement where assets are held by one party for the benefit of another
description_fr: Mécanisme juridique où des actifs sont détenus par un tiers au profit d'un bénéficiaire
characteristics: Common in Anglo-Saxon jurisdictions and estate planning

name: Family Office
description: Private entity managing wealth and investments for a family
description_fr: Structure privée de gestion patrimoniale et financière pour une famille
characteristics: Can be single-family or multi-family office

name: Other
description: Organization type not covered by other categories
description_fr: Type d'organisation non couvert par les autres catégories
